lore.shortDescription: Use your Channel Divinity to gain a +10 bonus to an attack roll.
lore.fullText: Starting at 2nd level, you can use your Channel Divinity to strike with supernatural accuracy. When you make an attack roll, you can use your Channel Divinity to gain a +10 bonus to the roll. You make this choice after you see the roll, but before the DM says whether the attack hits or misses.
